meta.name: php-symfony
meta.title: Php Symfony Skill
meta.description: Symfony development standards aligned with official Symfony Best Practices Triggers on: **/*.php, **/*.yaml, **/*.yml, **/*.xml, **/*.twig

original_definition.skill_description: Symfony development standards aligned with official Symfony Best Practices Triggers on: **/*.php, **/*.yaml, **/*.yml, **/*.xml, **/*.twig

actions.name: Use `.env` files to define environment-specific values
actions.description: Use `.env` files to define environment-specific values

actions.name: Use YAML as the preferred format for service configuration
actions.description: Use YAML as the preferred format for service configuration

actions.name: Use attributes to configure routing, caching, and security
actions.description: Use attributes to configure routing, caching, and security

actions.name: Define Doctrine mapping using PHP attributes
actions.description: Define Doctrine mapping using PHP attributes

actions.name: Define validation constraints on the underlying object
actions.description: Define validation constraints on the underlying object

actions.name: Use a single controller action to render and process each fo
actions.description: Use a single controller action to render and process each form

actions.name: Configure failure transports for failed messages
actions.description: Configure failure transports for failed messages

actions.name: Hard-code URLs in functional tests instead of generating rou
actions.description: Hard-code URLs in functional tests instead of generating routes

actions.name: Use unit tests where appropriate for isolated logic
actions.description: Use unit tests where appropriate for isolated logic

actions.name: Add more specific tests incrementally as the application evo
actions.description: Add more specific tests incrementally as the application evolves

rules.description: Do not create bundles for application code
Do not use environment variables to control application behavior
Never commit secrets to the repository
Prefix parameters with `app.` to avoid collisions
Do not place business logic in controllers
Avoid putting business logic in repositories
Avoid business logic in Twig templates
Avoid using `|raw` unless content is trusted and sanitized

directives.description: Instructions for developing Symfony applications following the official Symfony Best Practices and core framework philosophy.
Doctrine ORM when persistence is needed
Symfony Forms, Validator, Security, Messenger as needed
Keep configuration in `config/`, application code in `src/`, templates in `templates/`
